name: CampaignOps: Outlook Bookings Webhook
description: Booking created in Outlook Bookings → match email to lead → update status to 'booked' → resolve SLA → log audit

parameters.query: SELECT l.id, l.status FROM leads l JOIN contacts c ON l.contact_id = c.id WHERE LOWER(c.email) = LOWER('{{ $json.customer_email }}') AND l.status IN ('in_sequence', 'replied', 'approved') LIMIT 1
